name: koe
description: 声 — a voice born from nothing. No samples: a source-filter model synthesizes vowels and choirs from scratch — a glottal buzz shaped by vocal-tract resonances (formants), where F1/F2 set あいうえお. Play vowels on a formant pad and pitch on a pentatonic keyboard (so chords stay consonant), or let a seed's choir sing a wordless song. The synthesis core is DOM- and Web-Audio-independent and headless-tested (pitch periodicity, formant peaks). Zero dependencies, offline.
